glue.database.CfnAbout: The `AWS::Glue::Database` resource specifies a logical grouping of tables in AWS Glue. For more information, see [Defining a Database in Your Data Catalog](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/glue/latest/dg/define-database.html) and [Database Structure](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/glue/latest/dg/aws-glue-api-catalog-databases.html

glue.database.CatalogId.Description: The AWS account ID for the account in which to create the catalog object.   To specify the account ID, you can use the `Ref` intrinsic function with the `AWS::AccountId` pseudo parameter. For example: `!Ref AWS::AccountId`
